extraction.one_line_summary: PHILIPSEN Jasper won a technical sprint after Jumbo-Visma forced crosswind split at 10km creating 20-rider front group that caught several top sprinters behind
tactical_patterns: Jumbo-Visma initiated crosswind split at 10km despite unclear wind conditions, forcing nervous positioning that split peloton into 20 riders
VAN DER POEL Mathieu served as lead-out man for PHILIPSEN through technical finale with chicanes, releasing sprint at 175m mark
AUGNER Filippo bridged PHILIPSEN to front group by protecting GC leader position, inadvertently delivering rival sprinter to winning position

rider_signals.PHILIPSEN Jasper: positive: positioned perfectly in crosswind-induced front group while rival JACOBSEN caught behind, then finished technical sprint cleanly
rider_signals.VAN DER POEL Mathieu: positive: functioned as de facto lead-out specialist through complex finale despite typically being protected rider himself
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: neutral: prioritized front positioning during crosswind panic suggesting lingering concern about crash vulnerability from previous day
rider_signals.JACOBSEN Fabio: negative: caught behind crosswind split despite winning previous stage, then struggled physically using barriers for balance in finale
rider_signals.GIRMAY Biniam: positive: reached podium without team support in technical finale, showing improved sprint positioning skills
